statement: Read access vs edit access — Not decided yet: once a user has DCX access, can they edit — Permission service; Builder read-only mode; version status locks;
affected_modules: src/rules/permissions.rules.ts; src/hooks/usePermissions.ts; route guards; backend policy/service enforcement
ux_impact: Determines whether shared users are viewers or editors
open_questions: Recommended direction: all shared users can read; assigned/editor users can edit.
resolution: DCX access implies edit rights, except where version-status locks prevent editing.
